description_long: This object is a tall, slender potted plant with several elongated green stems emerging from a conical, dark-colored pot. The stems are topped with broad, flat, pointed leaves that are spaced irregularly, giving the plant a sparse and slightly wild appearance. The pot is simple and unadorned, with a matte finish and a slightly flared rim. The soil surface is visible at the top of the pot, appearing dark brown and flat. The plant's leaves vary in orientation, some drooping slightly while others stand more upright, contributing to a natural, organic look. The overall design suggests a decorative plant suitable for modern urban interiors or exteriors.
description: A tall, slender potted plant with elongated green stems and broad, pointed leaves in a plain, dark conical pot. The plant has a sparse, natural arrangement and a modern, minimalist appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing three main stems with several leaves, the pot's conical shape is clearly visible.
description_view_1: Top-angled view highlighting the spread of the leaves and the open soil surface inside the pot.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the height of the stems and the irregular spacing of the leaves.
description_view_3: Rear view with a clear look at the back stems and leaves, showing the plant's sparse arrangement.
attribute_plant_species: generic houseplant (possibly Dieffenbachia or similar broad-leaf species)
